channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 70/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 70/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 65%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour leadership talk ‘froth and nonsense’, says senior minister – UK politics live
item.description: Labour leadership talk ‘froth and nonsense’, says senior minister – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: It's official: Wes Streeting of the Labour Party wants to be Britain's next prime minister
item.description: It's official: Wes Streeting of the Labour Party wants to be Britain's next prime minister

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Streeting’s call for UK to rejoin EU pulls Labour back into Brexit wars
item.description: Politics latest: Streeting’s call for UK to rejoin EU pulls Labour back into Brexit wars

item.title: FT UK Politics: Streeting says he will battle Burnham for Labour leadership
item.description: Streeting says he will battle Burnham for Labour leadership

item.title: The Telegraph: Fund manager sells off ‘fragile’ UK bonds in warning sign for Burnham - The Telegraph
item.description: Fund manager sells off ‘fragile’ UK bonds in warning sign for Burnham - The Telegraph

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Taxes and Trump Leave UK in a Worse State Than Starmer Found It - Bloomberg.com
item.description: Taxes and Trump Leave UK in a Worse State Than Starmer Found It - Bloomberg.com

item.title: LabourList: Progress looks to post-Starmer phase as battle lines drawn with Burnham
item.description: Progress looks to post-Starmer phase as battle lines drawn with Burnham

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): The ungovernable country? Why Britain keeps losing prime ministers
item.description: The ungovernable country? Why Britain keeps losing prime ministers

item.title: BBC Politics: Labour leadership jostling puts Brexit back under political spotlight
item.description: Labour leadership jostling puts Brexit back under political spotlight

item.title: BBC Politics: Is it harder than ever to be prime minister?
item.description: Is it harder than ever to be prime minister?
